milestone: #1 Build / Export / Packaging: local-first evidence-backed playable artifact assembly
summary: Read-only demo manifest that walks the full v1 build/export/packaging flow over one small fixture game: export profile, export plan, local web bundle, asset manifest, build fingerprint/checksums, runtime probe check, export verification, and evidence bundle. The demo is local-only and evidence-backed; it does not publish, deploy, sign, notarize, upload, or commit generated outputs outside fixtures.

stages.coverage: The fixture game declares an allowed web-static export profile.
stages.expected: Profile parses; export target is an allowed v1 web target.

stages.coverage: The profile plans deterministically into source inputs and verification steps.
stages.expected: Plan lists the entry scene, assets, and allowlisted verification steps.

stages.coverage: The plan assembles a local web package under ignored staging.
stages.check: assemble_web_bundle into a temp staging directory.
stages.expected: Bundle contains index.html, runtime bootstrap, styles, and the entry scene; the runtime probe is preserved.

stages.coverage: Declared assets rewrite to packaged URLs with content hashes.
stages.expected: Each entry carries a sha256 content hash and a deterministic output path.

stages.coverage: The build fingerprint records per-artifact checksums and provenance.
stages.expected: Artifact checksums are non-empty and the toolchain id is recorded.

stages.coverage: Runtime probe compatibility survives packaging in dev and packaged modes.
stages.check: verify_export_bundle / probe checks in DevProbeEnabled and PackagedProbeLimited.
stages.expected: The runtime probe global and required methods remain present.

stages.coverage: Export verification runs allowlisted local checks only.
stages.expected: Verification passes on load/probe/scenario smoke; no network/install/credentialed command is introduced.

stages.coverage: The evidence bundle aggregates profile, plan, manifest, checksums, verification, and verdict.
stages.expected: Bundle verdict is pass; the read model serializes for read-only dashboard/Studio inspection.

guardrails: This demo enables local, evidence-backed build/export/package assembly, not public release, deployment, store publishing, or production distribution.
No signing, notarization, app-store/Steam/itch publishing, upload, deploy, credential use, or release workflow mutation.
Export verification uses allowlisted local commands only; there is no arbitrary command runner, command bridge, hidden command execution, or network/install command.
Export outputs, staging folders, package bundles, verification logs, checksums, and temp servers stay generated and ignored unless fixture-scoped.
Browser/dashboard/Studio surfaces remain read-only inspection surfaces; they cannot publish, deploy, sign, upload, or run arbitrary commands.
No production-ready export, secure distribution, commercial release readiness, multi-platform export parity, or current Godot replacement claim.
